LAST_DONE:    /admin landing UI shipped — commit e5cd29d on origin/main replaces
              the 54-line super_admin landing stub with a real platform console.
              All V32 §1 thresholds clean (318 LoC across 3 files, Tier 1 SAFE,
              single-dispatch surface).

              Files added:
                apps/web/src/app/admin/admin-landing-client.tsx (151 LoC)
                  — "use client" component receiving { email, roles } props
                    from the server gate. Calls trpc.platform.metrics.useQuery
                    + trpc.platform.list.useQuery from @/lib/trpc/client.
                  — Header row: title "Platform Admin Console" + subtitle
                    "Marine Guardian — Super Admin"; right side shows email +
                    role badges + <SignOutButton/>.
                  — KPI grid (grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-3): "Total Tenants" /
                    "Total Users" / "Total Events" cards reading
                    metrics.data?.{totalTenants|totalUsers|totalEvents}.
                    Renders em-dash placeholder while metrics.isLoading.
                  — Tenant overview Card containing shadcn <Table> with 6
                    columns (Name / Slug / Status / Users / Events 30d /
                    Created). Status column renders Badge variant="default"
                    when isActive else variant="secondary" with text
                    "Active"/"Inactive". Date formatted via toLocaleDateString.
                    Loading row: "Loading tenants…". Empty state: "No tenants
                    yet."
                apps/web/src/app/admin/__tests__/admin-landing-client.test.tsx
                  (144 LoC) — vitest jsdom, 5 cases:
                    (a) KPI placeholders ("—") while metrics loading
                    (b) populated metric values (3 / 12 / 87) on data
                    (c) "Loading tenants…" while list.isLoading
                    (d) "No tenants yet." when list.data is []
                    (e) tenant rows + status badges (one active, one inactive)
                  Uses vi.hoisted + vi.mock("@/lib/trpc/client", ...) per the
                  established pattern in apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/users/
                  __tests__/page.test.tsx. SignOutButton stubbed via
                  vi.mock("../sign-out-button", ...) to avoid pulling in the
                  next-auth signOut path.

              Files modified:
                apps/web/src/app/admin/page.tsx (54 → 23 LoC)
                  — Now a thin server component: auth() gate (super_admin role

              Decisions locked this session:
                (1) Item 1 split as server-gate-page + client-landing-component
                    (instead of one big server page that prefetches via RSC
                    caller). Rationale: matches the existing dashboard pattern
                    (see (dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx — also "use client" +
                    trpc hooks), keeps test surface tiny (vi.mock the client),
                    avoids introducing a server-side caller path that doesn't
                    exist yet. RSC prefetch can be added later without changing
                    the URL or props contract.
